name: privelegy-bali-club

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test lib/health.test.ts lib/mobile-api.test.ts lib/external-links.test.ts lib/public-request-policy.test.ts lib/request-correlation.test.ts mobile/tests/*.test.ts scripts/mobile-native-runtime.test.ts scripts/mobile-shell-contract.test.ts scripts/mobile-storage.test.ts scripts/capacitor-release.test.ts scripts/ios-app-shell.test.mjs scripts/ios-release-core.test.mjs scripts/partner-portal-boundary.test.mjs scripts/performance-boundary.test.mjs
scripts.ios:archive:dry: npm run mobile:build && npm run mobile:sync && node scripts/verify-ios-release.mjs --archive

//browserslist: Modern targets so Next/SWC stops shipping ES2022 polyfills (Array.at/flat/flatMap, Object.fromEntries/hasOwn, String.trimStart/End) — ~13.8 KB of legacy JS off every page. Floor is early-2022 browsers, which covers the tourist audience's phones.
